title: Layout System
description: Master SwiftUI's layout system with VStack, HStack, ZStack, and spacing.

sections.content:
## SwiftUI Layout System

SwiftUI provides powerful layout tools to arrange views.

### Stacks

| Stack | Direction | Best For |
|-------|-----------|----------|
| `VStack` | Vertical (top to bottom) | Lists, columns |
| `HStack` | Horizontal (left to right) | Rows, toolbars |
| `ZStack` | Depth (overlapping) | Backgrounds, badges |

### Spacing

Control space between views:

```swift
VStack(spacing: 20) {  // 20 points between items
    Text("First")
    Text("Second")
    Text("Third")
}
```

### Alignment

Align items within stacks:

```swift
VStack(alignment: .leading) {  // or .center, .trailing
    Text("Left aligned")
    Text("Also left")
}
```

sections.title: Stack Layout Demo
sections.expectedOutput: Dashboard layout with stats cards and progress bar

sections.question: Which stack type would you use to layer views on top of each other?
sections.explanation: ZStack layers views along the Z-axis (depth), placing them on top of each other.
